channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Three publishers challenge Google over AI copyright infringement
item.description: It's the latest in a barrage of efforts to win compensation from AI companies over training materials.

item.title: The next wave of emoji could help you evoke beauty and existential dread
item.description: Who has two thumbs and is broken inside?

item.title: 245.76TB Micron 6600 Ion SSD has a staggering 16GB RAM with a $100,000+ price tag, and is 'the one to beat in its class', reviewer says
item.description: Micron's 245.76 TB enterprise SSD combines massive onboard memory with strong benchmark performance, although verified pricing remains unavailable.

item.title: How to watch MLB All-Star Game 2026 — watch baseball online from anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch MLB All-Star Game 2026 live streams online and from anywhere as the National League eyes back-to-back wins against the American League.

item.title: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
item.description: If you’ve been waiting to try Apple’s revamped Siri without installing a developer beta, you now can. The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to its AI-powered assistant and other new features before the software’s official launch this fall.

item.title: Anthropic’s newest ad is creeping people out
item.description: Anthropic has consistently attempted to depict itself as the ethical foil to other AI companies. This latest marketing stunt — which leans into criticism of AI as a way to make Anthropic seem aware of the responsibility it carries — would appear to be more of the same.

item.title: The founder of Hinge raised $18M to build a new AI dating service, Overtone
item.description: Overtone describes itself as "a voice- and audio-forward service, enabled by AI, that provides highly curated introductions."

item.title: SpaceXAI’s Grok programming tool was uploading its users’ entire codebase to cloud storage
item.description: SpaceXAI's Grok Build AI coding tool was spotted uploading users' entire codebases to Google Cloud before it was reported, and the company turned it off. The Register reports that Cereblab published findings on Monday showing how the Grok Build CLI was packaging and uploading entire code repositories, "including files it was told not to open […]

item.title: PlayStation FlexStrike wireless fight stick delayed without a firm release date
item.description: Sorry Marvel Tokon fans, PlayStation's FlexStrike fight stick has been delayed.

item.title: RayNeo X3 Pro review: These AI+AR Smart Glasses are technically impressive, but far from easy to use
item.description: The RayNeo X3 Pro is the most technically accomplished pair of AR smart glasses available today, pairing a genuinely stunning dual-eye MicroLED display with Qualcomm's Snapdragon AR1 platform, Google Gemini 2.5 AI, and a 12MP Sony camera.
